mnemonics: S.O.L.I.D. Foundation: Start projects with Solid Objectives, Launch plans, Initiate teams, Define scope, and Document everything.
keyPoints: Clearly define project vision, goals, and objectives
Identify all stakeholders and their requirements
Establish scope, constraints, and success criteria
commonMistakes: Skipping stakeholder analysis leading to missed requirements
Failing to establish clear, measurable success criteria
Not documenting assumptions and constraints which leads to scope creep
